title: Annabelle Hooper and the Ghosts of Nantucket
original_title: Annabelle Hooper and the Ghosts of Nantucket
overview: Vacationing on historic Nantucket Island, a teenage mystery writer and her friends must outwit two scheming thieves to solve the secret behind a legendary ghost story.
